lede: A look at October 6 through the almanac — historic events, famous birthdays including Isaac Brock and Le Corbusier, and the day's notable deaths and observances.

events.title: Murder of Keith Blakelock
events.desc: Police constable Keith Blakelock is murdered as riots erupt in the Broadwater Farm suburb of London.

events.title: Anwar Sadat
events.desc: Egyptian President Anwar Sadat is murdered by Islamic extremists.

events.title: Pope John Paul II
events.desc: Pope John Paul II becomes the first pontiff to visit the White House.

events.title: World War II
events.desc: World War II: The Battle of Kock is the final combat of the September Campaign in Poland.

events.title: The Jazz Singer
events.desc: Opening of The Jazz Singer, the first prominent "talkie" movie.

events.title: World War I
events.desc: World War I: Combined Austro-Hungarian and German Central Powers, reinforced by the recently joined Bulgaria launched a new offensive against Serbia under command of August von Mackensen.

events.title: American Revolutionary War
events.desc: American Revolutionary War: British forces capture Forts Clinton and Montgomery on the Hudson River.

events.title: Seven Years' War
events.desc: Seven Years' War: The British capture Manila from Spain and occupy it.

events.title: Transition from Sui to Tang
events.desc: Transition from Sui to Tang: Wang Shichong decisively defeats Li Mi at the Battle of Yanshi.

births.name: Isaac Brock
births.line: English general and politician, Lieutenant Governor of Upper Canada

births.name: Le Corbusier
births.line: Swiss-French architect and painter, designed the Philips Pavilion and Saint-Pierre, Firminy

births.name: Wenceslaus III of Bohemia
births.line: King of Bohemia and Poland from 1305 to 1306

deaths.text: Anwar Sadat, Egyptian colonel and politician, 3rd President of Egypt, Nobel Prize laureate
Otto Fritz Meyerhof, German-American physician and biochemist, Nobel Prize laureate

observances.text: Christian feast day: Blessed Marie Rose Durocher
Christian feast day: Blessed Juan de Palafox y Mendoza
Christian feast day: Mary Frances of the Five Wounds
